messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Topic lifecycle is a diff, not a reconciliation — a completion missed while the bot is down is lost permanently
What it solves: THE DEFECT. Completion events are a DIFF, not a reconciliation: diffTaskCompleted
(extension/src/events/swarmEventStream.ts:58) compares the PREVIOUS snapshot's done-set with
the CURRENT one and emits only the newly-appeared ids. If the bot is down, crash-looping, or
running a stale build at the mo…
How it works: A completion that happened while the bot was down is still reconciled

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-330 - Topic lifecycle is a diff, not a reconciliation — a completion missed while the bot is down is lost permanently is complete.
